Books.question: Who are the authors of the book 'Agatthiyar – The Unifier'?
options: O. Shama Bhat and Dr. M. N. Sudha
Sudha Murty and P. P. Sathyan
General Upendra Dwivedi and Vinod Rai
Books.answer: O. Shama Bhat and Dr. M. N. Sudha
